name: studio.list_members
description: Enumerate team members on an Actium Studio site: user id, email, role, and last-active timestamp. Read-only — membership writes are not bundled in this pack.
whenToUse: Audit flow: answer 'who has access to this site' for a compliance or handoff report.
Pre-flight before an operator-driven membership change in the Studio console — know the current roster first.
Debugging: identify the owner email when a permissions-related error surfaces during another flow.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to invite, update, or remove a member — those operations are not bundled in this pack per work-r1-actium-studio-skills.md §1.1; use the Studio operator console.
Caller wants billing roles or seat counts — use studio.get_billing_overview; member list is identity + permission only.
Caller has no site_id — use studio.list_sites to resolve first.
